g.title: action.fieldset:fieldset_group->action.fieldset_group:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fieldset_group) REFERENCES action.fieldset_group(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.fieldset:owner->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.fieldset:owning_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owning_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.fieldset:stored_query->query.stored_query:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (stored_query) REFERENCES query.stored_query(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.fieldset_col_val:fieldset->action.fieldset:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fieldset) REFERENCES action.fieldset(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
